policies.backend:
<retry count="@{
            var isAlias = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("is-alias", false);
            var fallback = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("alias-fallback-members");
            return isAlias && fallback != null ? 2 + fallback.Count : 2;
        }" interval="0" first-fast-retry="true" condition="@(context.Response.StatusCode == 429 || (context.Response.StatusCode >= 500 && !context.Response.StatusReason.Contains("Backend pool") && !context.Response.StatusReason.Contains("is temporarily unavailable")))">
            
                <when condition="@{
                    if (!context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("is-alias", false)) { return false; }
                    // Only advance to a fallback member AFTER a real failure on the previous hop.
                    // The  body executes once as the INITIAL attempt (with the primary member
                    // selected during inbound). On that first execution there is no backend response
                    // yet (StatusCode == 0), so we must NOT switch — otherwise the primary member is
                    // skipped entirely and never forwarded. On subsequent executions (triggered by the
                    // retry condition on 429/5xx) context.Response carries the failed status, so we
                    // advance to the next fallback member.
                    var sc = context.Response?.StatusCode ?? 0;
                    var previousHopFailed = sc == 429 || sc >= 500;
                    if (!previousHopFailed) { return false; }
                    var fallback = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("alias-fallback-members");
                    var idx = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("alias-retry-index", 0);
                    return fallback != null && idx < fallback.Count;
                }">
                    <set-variable name="alias-retry-index" value="@{
                        var current = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("alias-retry-index", 0);
                        return current + 1;
                    }" />
                    <set-variable name="alias-current-member" value="@{
                        var fallback = (JArray)context.Variables["alias-fallback-members"];
                        var idx = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("alias-retry-index", 1) - 1;
                        return idx >= 0 && idx < fallback.Count ? (JObject)fallback[idx] : null;
                    }" />
                    
                        <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("alias-current-member") != null)">
                            
                            
                            
                            
                            
                                @($"Azure OpenAI alias fallback hop #{context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("alias-retry-index", 0)} → model='{context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", "")}' pool='{context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("targetBackendPool", "")}' (status={context.Response.StatusCode})")
                            
                            
                            
                            
                            <set-variable name="openAIRewriteTemplate" value="@{
                                string requestedModel = (string)context.Variables["requestedModel"];
                                string originalAlias  = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("original-model-alias", "");
                                string apiPath = (context.Api.Path ?? "").Trim('/');
                                string path = context.Request.OriginalUrl.Path.TrimStart('/');
                                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(apiPath)) {
                                    if (path.StartsWith(apiPath + "/", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
                                        path = path.Substring(apiPath.Length + 1);
                                    } else if (path.Equals(apiPath, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
                                        path = "";
                                    }
                                }
                                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(originalAlias)) {
                                    var marker = "deployments/" + originalAlias;
                                    var idx = path.IndexOf(marker, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                                    if (idx >= 0) {
                                        int afterAliasStart = idx + marker.Length;
                                        if (afterAliasStart >= path.Length || path[afterAliasStart] == '/') {
                                            path = path.Substring(0, idx) + "deployments/" + requestedModel + path.Substring(afterAliasStart);
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                                return string.Format("openai/{0}", path);
                            }" />
